nasb.text: For you will be in league with the stones of the field, And the beasts of the field will be at peace with you.

esv.text: For you shall be in league with the stones of the field, and the beasts of the field shall be at peace with you.

cnv.text: 你必與田間的石頭立約， 田間的野獸必與你和平相處。

ccb.text: 你必与田间的石头立约， 野兽必与你和平相处。
